message:
feat: add asset bootstrap pipeline and fix concurrent agent changes

- Add cli/assets.rs: manifest-driven asset download, verify, cache, prefetch
  with SHA-256 integrity, offline diagnostics, cache cleanup, resumable downloads
- Fix ref-pattern compilation error in cli/from_source.rs (Rust 2024 edition)
- 30 tests covering manifest roundtrip, cache operations, fetch pipeline, offline mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
